Details: Rula Health seeks a Licensed Clinical Professional Counselor to deliver high-quality, telehealth-based psychotherapy within our Healthcare & Medical Services team. You’ll conduct assessments, provide evidence-based counseling, create treatment plans, and coordinate care with psychiatrists and other providers. In our remote-first, mission-driven culture, you’ll expand access to mental healthcare at scale while enjoying flexibility, cross-functional collaboration, and tools that streamline docume…
description: **Rula Health** is looking for licensed clinical professional counselors to deliver telehealth-based mental health services, with both full-time and part-time openings available. The role is fully remote, so you can work from East Cobb while helping expand access to mental healthcare across the country. If you're a licensed therapist looking for flexibility without giving up meaningful clinical work, this one is worth a look.
roles: telehealth mental health counselors, licensed clinical professional counselors
